article_title: B.C. Reg. 244/2025 – British Columbia Assessment Authority

briefs.title: Telecom property tax assessment rates rise for 2026 under updated BC valuation rules
briefs.summary: BC has updated the formula used to calculate property taxes for telecommunications companies, raising key dollar values — including a per-unit rate from $640 to $685 and an installation cost from $504 to $539 — effective for the 2026 assessment year.

key_dates.label: BC Telecommunications Corporations Valuation Regulation updated rates take effect for 2026 assessment year

briefs.article_title: B.C. Reg. 244/2025 – British Columbia Assessment Authority
